# TramFront

<img src="data:image/svg+xml;base64," alt="TramFront icon">

<div class="dioxus-icons-widget" data-icon-name="TramFront" data-svg="&lt;svg xmlns=&quot;http://www.w3.org/2000/svg&quot; width=&quot;24&quot; height=&quot;24&quot; viewBox=&quot;0 0 24 24&quot; fill=&quot;none&quot; stroke=&quot;currentColor&quot; stroke-width=&quot;2&quot; stroke-linecap=&quot;round&quot; stroke-linejoin=&quot;round&quot;&gt;&lt;rect height=&quot;16&quot; rx=&quot;2&quot; width=&quot;16&quot; x=&quot;4&quot; y=&quot;3&quot;&gt;&lt;/rect&gt;&lt;path d=&quot;M4 11h16&quot;&gt;&lt;/path&gt;&lt;path d=&quot;M12 3v8&quot;&gt;&lt;/path&gt;&lt;path d=&quot;m8 19-2 3&quot;&gt;&lt;/path&gt;&lt;path d=&quot;m18 22-2-3&quot;&gt;&lt;/path&gt;&lt;path d=&quot;M8 15h.01&quot;&gt;&lt;/path&gt;&lt;path d=&quot;M16 15h.01&quot;&gt;&lt;/path&gt;&lt;/svg&gt;" data-size="24" data-color="#000000" data-stroke="2"><div class="dioxus-icons-widget-header"><div class="dioxus-icons-widget-preview" data-di-preview="true" aria-label="TramFront preview"><img src="data:image/svg+xml;base64," alt="TramFront icon"></div><div class="dioxus-icons-widget-controls"><label><span class="dioxus-icons-widget-label">Size</span><input data-di-size="true" type="number" min="1" max="256" value="24"></label><label><span class="dioxus-icons-widget-label">Color</span><input data-di-color="true" type="color" value="#000000"></label><label><span class="dioxus-icons-widget-label">Stroke</span><input data-di-stroke="true" type="number" min="1" max="12" value="2"></label></div></div><div class="dioxus-icons-widget-output"><pre class="dioxus-icons-widget-code dxc dxc-system dxc-system-light-github-light dxc-system-dark-github-dark" data-language="rust"><code data-di-code="true"><span class="a-t">TramFront</span><span> </span><span class="a-p">{</span><span> </span><span class="a-pr">size</span><span class="a-p">:</span><span> </span><span class="a-co">24</span><span class="a-p">,</span><span> </span><span class="a-pr">stroke</span><span class="a-p">:</span><span> </span><span class="a-s">&quot;#000000&quot;</span><span class="a-p">,</span><span> </span><span class="a-pr">stroke_width</span><span class="a-p">:</span><span> </span><span class="a-co">2</span><span> </span><span class="a-p">}</span></code></pre><button type="button" class="dioxus-icons-widget-copy" data-di-copy="true" aria-label="Copy RSX snippet"><span data-di-copy-icon="true"></span><span data-di-copy-label="true">Copy RSX</span></button></div></div>

## Example
```rust
use dioxus::prelude::*;
use dioxus_icons::lucide::TramFront;

fn app() -> Element {
    rsx! {
        TramFront { size: 20, stroke: "red" }
    }
}
```

## Tags
railway, metro, subway, underground, track, line, tourism

transportation
